text_body.plain_text: ~0.2-1.2 vessels per year is insufficient for serial production (5+ hulls/yr. to achieve max labor efficiencies by end of year 2)

runs.text: Note: (1) Service life assumptions – 40 years for Bulk, Container, General Cargo, and RORO, 35 years for Tankers, 30 years for PSVs, and 25 years for Crew/FSVs; (2) All Oceangoing Commercial vessels in orderbook are built at Hanwha Philly, including containerships purchased by Matson and 12x tankers (10x Chemical & Oil and 2x LNG) purchased by Hanwha Shipping | Source: Clarksons (US fleet size and GT data)

text_body.plain_text: Note: (1) Service life assumptions – 40 years for Bulk, Container, General Cargo, and RORO, 35 years for Tankers, 30 years for PSVs, and 25 years for Crew/FSVs; (2) All Oceangoing Commercial vessels in orderbook are built at Hanwha Philly, including containerships purchased by Matson and 12x tankers (10x Chemical & Oil and 2x LNG) purchased by Hanwha Shipping | Source: Clarksons (US fleet size and GT data)
